_comment: Deploy-time address book for the pilot (Working Committee DAO sandbox). Copy to config/pilot.addresses.json (gitignored) and fill with real Base Sepolia addresses before deploy. Feeds the ${PLACEHOLDER} targets in reserved-matters.yaml (RM-PILOT-001/002) and the runtime EvalContext.reservedTargets so the CougarDAO ring-fence is enforced by target. See governance/CGP-001-working-committee-dao-pilot.md.
_floatComment: PILOT_FLOAT_CAP is the total ring-fenced budget in USDC base units (6 decimals). 5000000000 = $5,000. RM-PILOT-001 makes this a hard ceiling on top of the per-agent RolesModifier caps.
_treasuryComment: PILOT_TREASURY is the sandbox Treasury contract (Deploy.s.sol Treasury, owner = Timelock). Fill after deploy.
_allowlistComment: PILOT_ALLOWLIST: addresses TREAS-01 may rebalance the float among, and OPS-01 may pay. Vendors/recipients only — never a CougarDAO address.
_usdcComment: Base Sepolia USDC (the spending-cap token + the bounded-op call target).
_guardianComment: Sandbox Guardian multisig (2-of-3 / 3-of-5 of the committee). Holds CANCELLER_ROLE + every constitutional admin role. MUST differ from the deployer (Deploy.s.sol require). Placeholder below is anvil account #1 for local demo only.
_reservedTargetsComment: RM-PILOT-002 ring-fence. $COUG is a hard literal already baked into RESERVED_TARGET_SET. The rest are RESERVED_TARGET_PLACEHOLDERS that MUST be resolved here and injected into the runtime (EvalContext.reservedTargets) before mainnet — the sandbox may never call any of these.
_agentsComment: The four pilot agent accounts (see mandates/pilot/). Placeholders are anvil dev accounts for local demo. On testnet, use freshly-funded keys held in the agent runtime (never the guardian's).
